title: Senior Visual Merchandiser at Crossword Bookstores Consulting Pvt Ltd

jsonLd.title: Senior Visual Merchandiser at Crossword Bookstores Consulting Pvt Ltd
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Visual Merchandiser with drive and ambition, Crossword Bookstores Consulting Pvt Ltd in Delhi is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Crossword Bookstores Consulting Pvt Ltd:
Crossword Bookstores Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Retail Operations

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Delhi, Delhi, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Crossword Bookstores Consulting Pvt Ltd!
